Container.Name: PMDA
Container.Overview: PMDA scans music folders, matches albums, isolates duplicates and incomplete releases, publishes a fast PostgreSQL-backed library, and provides playback, recommendations, and export workflows.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the PMDA web UI.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Persistent PMDA data: PostgreSQL, Redis state, settings, auth state, and logs.

Config.Name: Music Root
Config.Description: Parent folder that contains the PMDA source folders. Configure the exact Standard and Incoming folders later in PMDA Settings.

Config.Name: Review Root
Config.Description: Root folder used for duplicate and incomplete review targets.

Config.Name: Cache Directory
Config.Description: SSD or NVMe cache for artwork and derived media. Strongly recommended.

Config.Name: Export Directory
Config.Description: Optional clean export library root for hardlinks, symlinks, copies, or moves.

Config.Name: Enable PMDA Auth
Config.Description: Enable PMDA accounts and session-based access control.

Config.Name: Media Cache Root
Config.Description: Container path for PMDA artwork and media cache. Leave this set to /cache.

Config.Name: Trust Proxy Headers
Config.Description: Enable when PMDA is behind Cloudflare Tunnel or another reverse proxy.

Config.Name: Secure Session Cookies
Config.Description: Set to true when PMDA is served over HTTPS.

Config.Name: Allow Public Bootstrap
Config.Description: Leave false for normal deployments. Only enable temporarily on a trusted network if required for first-user setup.
